verses.latin_vulgate: Anno tertio regni Joakim regis Juda, venit Nabuchodonosor, rex Babylonis, in Jerusalem, et obsedit eam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַ֣ת שָׁל֔וֹשׁ לְמַלְכ֖וּת יְהוֹיָקִ֣ים מֶֽלֶךְ־יְהוּדָ֑ה בָּ֣א נְבוּכַדְנֶאצַּ֧ר מֶֽלֶךְ־בָּבֶ֛ל יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם וַיָּ֥צַר עָלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the third year of the reign of Joakim, king of Juda, Nabuchodonosor, king of Babylon, came to Jerusalem, and beseiged it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmantena Jojakimin, Juudan kuninkaan, valtakunnan vuotena tuli Nebukadnetsar, Babelin kuningas Jerusalemin eteen, ja piiritti sen.
verses.king_james: In the third year of the reign of Jehoiakim king of Judah came Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon unto Jerusalem, and besieged it.

verses.latin_vulgate: et tradidit Dominus in manu ejus Joakim, regem Juda, et partem vasorum domus Dei : et asportavit ea in terram Sennaar in domum dei sui, et vasa intulit in domum thesauri dei sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּן֩ אֲדֹנָ֨י בְּיָד֜וֹ אֶת־יְהוֹיָקִ֣ים מֶֽלֶךְ־יְהוּדָ֗ה וּמִקְצָת֙ כְּלֵ֣י בֵית־הָֽאֱלֹהִ֔ים וַיְבִיאֵ֥ם אֶֽרֶץ־שִׁנְעָ֖ר בֵּ֣ית אֱלֹהָ֑יו וְאֶת־הַכֵּלִ֣ים הֵבִ֔יא בֵּ֖ית אוֹצַ֥ר אֱלֹהָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord delivered into his hands Joakim, the king of Juda, and part of the vessels of the house of God: and he carried them away into the land of Sennaar, to the house of his god, and the vessels he brought into the treasure house of his god.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra antoi Jojakimin, Juudan kuninkaan hänen käsiinsä, ja muutamia astioita Jumalan huoneesta; ne antoi hän viedä Sinearin maalle, jumalansa huoneesen, ja pani ne astiat jumalansa tavarahuoneesen.
verses.king_james: And the Lord gave Jehoiakim king of Judah into his hand, with part of the vessels of the house of God: which he carried into the land of Shinar to the house of his god; and he brought the vessels into the treasure house of his god.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait rex Asphenez præposito eunuchorum ut introduceret de filiis Israël, et de semine regio et tyrannorum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ לְאַשְׁפְּנַ֖ז רַ֣ב סָרִיסָ֑יו לְהָבִ֞יא מִבְּנֵ֧י יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל וּמִזֶּ֥רַע הַמְּלוּכָ֖ה וּמִן־הַֽפַּרְתְּמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king spoke to Asphenez, the master of the eunuchs, that he should bring in some of the children of Israel, and of the king's seed, and of the princes,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas sanoi Aspenaalle, ylimmäiselle kamaripalveliallensa, että hänen piti Israelin lapsista kuninkaallisesta suvusta ja berrain lapsista valitseman
verses.king_james: And the king spake unto Ashpenaz the master of his eunuchs, that he should bring certain of the children of Israel, and of the king’s seed, and of the princes;

verses.latin_vulgate: pueros in quibus nulla esset macula, decoros forma, et eruditos omni sapientia, cautos scientia, et doctos disciplina, et qui possent stare in palatio regis, ut doceret eos litteras et linguam Chaldæorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְלָדִ֣ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר אֵֽין־בָּהֶ֣ם כׇּל־מאֿוּם֩ וְטוֹבֵ֨י מַרְאֶ֜ה וּמַשְׂכִּלִ֣ים בְּכׇל־חׇכְמָ֗ה וְיֹ֤דְעֵי דַ֙עַת֙ וּמְבִינֵ֣י מַדָּ֔ע וַאֲשֶׁר֙ כֹּ֣חַ בָּהֶ֔ם לַעֲמֹ֖ד בְּהֵיכַ֣ל הַמֶּ֑לֶךְ וּֽלְלַמְּדָ֥ם סֵ֖פֶר וּלְשׁ֥וֹן כַּשְׂדִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Children in whom there was no blemish, well favoured, and skilful in all wisdom, acute in knowledge, and instructed in science, and such as might stand in the king's palace, that he might teach them the learning, and tongue of the Chaldeans.
verses.finnish_biblia: Virheettömiä poikia, kauniita, toimellisia, viisaita, ymmärtäväisiä, taitavia, jotka soveliaat olisivat palvelemaan kuninkaan huoneessa, ja piti opettaman heille Kaldean kirjoituksia ja kieltä.
verses.king_james: Children in whom was no blemish, but well favoured, and skilful in all wisdom, and cunning in knowledge, and understanding science, and such as had ability in them to stand in the king’s palace, and whom they might teach the learning and the tongue of the Chaldeans.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et constituit eis rex annonam per singulos dies de cibis suis, et de vino unde bibebat ipse, ut enutriti tribus annis, postea starent in conspectu regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְמַן֩ לָהֶ֨ם הַמֶּ֜לֶךְ דְּבַר־י֣וֹם בְּיוֹמ֗וֹ מִפַּת־בַּ֤ג הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ וּמִיֵּ֣ין מִשְׁתָּ֔יו וּֽלְגַדְּלָ֖ם שָׁנִ֣ים שָׁל֑וֹשׁ וּמִ֨קְצָתָ֔ם יַֽעַמְד֖וּ לִפְנֵ֥י הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king appointed them a daily provision, of his own meat, and of the wine of which he drank himself, that being nourished three years, afterwards they might stand before the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niille toimitti kuningas, mitä heille joka päivä annettaman piti kuninkaan ruasta ja sitä viinaa, jota hän itse joi; että he niin kolme vuotta kasvatettaman ja sitte kuninkaan edessä palveleman piti,
verses.king_james: And the king appointed them a daily provision of the king’s meat, and of the wine which he drank: so nourishing them three years, that at the end thereof they might stand before the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuerunt ergo inter eos de filiis Juda, Daniel, Ananias, Misaël, et Azarias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י בָהֶ֖ם מִבְּנֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה דָּנִיֵּ֣אל חֲנַנְיָ֔ה מִֽישָׁאֵ֖ל וַעֲזַרְיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now there was among them of the children of Juda, Daniel, Ananias, Misael, and Azarias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joiden seassa olivat Juudan lapsista: Daniel, Hanania, Misael ja Asaria.
verses.king_james: Now among these were of the children of Judah, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, and Azariah:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et imposuit eis præpositus eunuchorum nomina : Danieli, Baltassar ; Ananiæ, Sidrach ; Misaëli, Misach ; et Azariæ, Abdenago.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֧שֶׂם לָהֶ֛ם שַׂ֥ר הַסָּרִיסִ֖ים שֵׁמ֑וֹת וַיָּ֨שֶׂם לְדָֽנִיֵּ֜אל בֵּ֣לְטְשַׁאצַּ֗ר וְלַֽחֲנַנְיָה֙ שַׁדְרַ֔ךְ וּלְמִֽישָׁאֵ֣ל מֵישַׁ֔ךְ וְלַעֲזַרְיָ֖ה עֲבֵ֥ד נְגֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the master of the eunuchs gave them names: to Daniel, Baltassar: to Ananias, Sidrach: to Misael, Misach: and to Azarias, Abdenago.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ylimmäinen kamaripalvelia antoi heille nimet, ja nimitti Danielin Belsatsariksi ja Hananian Sadrakiksi, ja Misaelin Mesakiksi, ja Asarian Abednegoksi.
verses.king_james: Unto whom the prince of the eunuchs gave names: for he gave unto Daniel the name of Belteshazzar; and to Hananiah, of Shadrach; and to Mishael, of Meshach; and to Azariah, of Abed–nego.

verses.latin_vulgate: Proposuit autem Daniel in corde suo ne pollueretur de mensa regis, neque de vino potus ejus : et rogavit eunuchorum præpositum ne contaminaretur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤שֶׂם דָּנִיֵּאל֙ עַל־לִבּ֔וֹ אֲשֶׁ֧ר לֹֽא־יִתְגָּאַ֛ל בְּפַת־בַּ֥ג הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ וּבְיֵ֣ין מִשְׁתָּ֑יו וַיְבַקֵּשׁ֙ מִשַּׂ֣ר הַסָּרִיסִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֖ר לֹ֥א יִתְגָּאָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Daniel purposed in his heart that he would not be defiled with the king's table, nor with the wine which he drank: and he requested the master of the eunuchs that he might not be defiled.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Daniel aikoi sydämessänsä, ettei hän kuninkaan rualla eikä sillä viinalla, jota hän itse joi, itseänsä saastuttaisi; ja rukoili ylimmäistä kamaripalveliaa, ettei hän itseänsä saastuttaisi.
verses.king_james: But Daniel purposed in his heart that he would not defile himself with the portion of the king’s meat, nor with the wine which he drank: therefore he requested of the prince of the eunuchs that he might not defile himself.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dedit autem Deus Danieli gratiam et misericordiam in conspectu principis eunuchorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֤ן הָֽאֱלֹהִים֙ אֶת־דָּ֣נִיֵּ֔אל לְחֶ֖סֶד וּֽלְרַחֲמִ֑ים לִפְנֵ֖י שַׂ֥ר הַסָּרִיסִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And God gave to Daniel grace and mercy in the sight of the prince of the eunuchs.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jumala antoi Danielille, että ylimmäinen kamaripalvelia oli hänelle ystävällinen ja armollinen.
verses.king_james: Now God had brought Daniel into favour and tender love with the prince of the eunuchs.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait princeps eunuchorum ad Danielem : Timeo ego dominum meum regem, qui constituit vobis cibum et potum : qui si viderit vultus vestros macilentiores præ ceteris adolescentibus coævis vestris, condemnabitis caput meum regi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֜אמֶר שַׂ֤ר הַסָּרִיסִים֙ לְדָ֣נִיֵּ֔אל יָרֵ֤א אֲנִי֙ אֶת־אֲדֹנִ֣י הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ אֲשֶׁ֣ר מִנָּ֔ה אֶת־מַאֲכַלְכֶ֖ם וְאֶת־מִשְׁתֵּיכֶ֑ם אֲשֶׁ֡ר לָ֩מָּה֩ יִרְאֶ֨ה אֶת־פְּנֵיכֶ֜ם זֹֽעֲפִ֗ים מִן־הַיְלָדִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר כְּגִֽילְכֶ֔ם וְחִיַּבְתֶּ֥ם אֶת־רֹאשִׁ֖י לַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the prince of the eunuchs said to Daniel: I fear my lord, the king, who hath appointed you meat and drink: who if he should see your faces leaner than those of the other youths, your equals, you shall endanger my head to the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ylimmäinen kamaripalvelia sanoi Danielille: minä pelkään minun herraani, kuningasta, joka teille teidän ruokanne ja juomanne toimittanut on; jos hän näkis teidän kasvonne laihemmiksi kuin muiden teidän ikäistenne, niin te minun sitte saatte kuninkaan tykönä pois hengeltäni.
verses.king_james: And the prince of the eunuchs said unto Daniel, I fear my lord the king, who hath appointed your meat and your drink: for why should he see your faces worse liking than the children which are of your sort? then shall ye make me endanger my head to the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Daniel ad Malasar, quem constituerat princeps eunuchorum super Danielem, Ananiam, Misaëlem, et Azariam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר דָּנִיֵּ֖אל אֶל־הַמֶּלְצַ֑ר אֲשֶׁ֤ר מִנָּה֙ שַׂ֣ר הַסָּֽרִיסִ֔ים עַל־דָּנִיֵּ֣אל חֲנַנְיָ֔ה מִֽישָׁאֵ֖ל וַעֲזַרְיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Daniel said to Malasar, whom the prince of the eunuchs had appointed over Daniel, Ananias, Misael, and Azarias:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Daniel Meltsarille. jolle ylimmäinen kamaripalvelia Danielista, Hananiasta, Misaelista ja Asariasta käskyn antanut oli:
verses.king_james: Then said Daniel to Melzar, whom the prince of the eunuchs had set over Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, and Azariah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Tenta nos, obsecro, servos tuos, diebus decem, et dentur nobis legumina ad vescendum, et aqua ad bibendum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַס־נָ֥א אֶת־עֲבָדֶ֖יךָ יָמִ֣ים עֲשָׂרָ֑ה וְיִתְּנוּ־לָ֜נוּ מִן־הַזֵּרֹעִ֛ים וְנֹאכְלָ֖ה וּמַ֥יִם וְנִשְׁתֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Try, I beseech thee, thy servants for ten days, and let pulse be given us to eat, and water to drink:
verses.finnish_biblia: Koettele palvelioitas kymmenen päivää, ja annettakaan meille puuroa syödäksemme ja vettä juodaksemme.
verses.king_james: Prove thy servants, I beseech thee, ten days; and let them give us pulse to eat, and water to drink.

verses.latin_vulgate: et contemplare vultus nostros, et vultus puerorum, qui vescuntur cibo regio : et sicut videris, facies cum servis tuis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֵרָא֤וּ לְפָנֶ֙יךָ֙ מַרְאֵ֔ינוּ וּמַרְאֵה֙ הַיְלָדִ֔ים הָאֹ֣כְלִ֔ים אֵ֖ת פַּת־בַּ֣ג הַמֶּ֑לֶךְ וְכַאֲשֶׁ֣ר תִּרְאֵ֔ה עֲשֵׂ֖ה עִם־עֲבָדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And look upon our faces, and the faces of the children that eat of the king's meat: and as thou shalt see, deal with thy servants.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja anna niin meidän muotomme ja niiden poikain muoto, jotka kuninkaan ruasta syövät, katsottaa; ja niinkuin sinä sitte näet, tee niin palvelioilles.
verses.king_james: Then let our countenances be looked upon before thee, and the countenance of the children that eat of the portion of the king’s meat: and as thou seest, deal with thy servants.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui, audito sermone hujuscemodi, tentavit eos diebus decem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמַ֥ע לָהֶ֖ם לַדָּבָ֣ר הַזֶּ֑ה וַיְנַסֵּ֖ם יָמִ֥ים עֲשָׂרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he had heard these words, he tried them for ten days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän totteli heitä siinä, ja koetteli heitä kymmenen päivää.
verses.king_james: So he consented to them in this matter, and proved them ten days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Post dies autem decem, apparuerunt vultus eorum meliores, et corpulentiores præ omnibus pueris, qui vescebantur cibo regio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִקְצָת֙ יָמִ֣ים עֲשָׂרָ֔ה נִרְאָ֤ה מַרְאֵיהֶם֙ ט֔וֹב וּבְרִיאֵ֖י בָּשָׂ֑ר מִ֨ן־כׇּל־הַיְלָדִ֔ים הָאֹ֣כְלִ֔ים אֵ֖ת פַּת־בַּ֥ג הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after ten days, their faces appeared fairer and fatter than all the children that ate of the king's meat.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kymmenen päivän perästä olivat he kauniimmat ja lihavammat ruumiilta kuin kaikki nuorukaiset, jotka kuninkaan ruasta söivät.
verses.king_james: And at the end of ten days their countenances appeared fairer and fatter in flesh than all the children which did eat the portion of the king’s meat.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Malasar tollebat cibaria, et vinum potus eorum : dabatque eis legumina.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י הַמֶּלְצַ֗ר נֹשֵׂא֙ אֶת־פַּת־בָּגָ֔ם וְיֵ֖ין מִשְׁתֵּיהֶ֑ם וְנֹתֵ֥ן לָהֶ֖ם זֵרְעֹנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Malasar took their portions, and the wine that they should drink: and he gave them pulse.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin pani Meltsari pois heidän määrätyn ruokansa ja viinajuomansa, ja antoi heille puuroa.
verses.king_james: Thus Melzar took away the portion of their meat, and the wine that they should drink; and gave them pulse.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pueris autem his dedit Deus scientiam et disciplinam, in omni libro et sapientia : Danieli autem intelligentiam omnium visionum et somniorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַיְלָדִ֤ים הָאֵ֙לֶּה֙ אַרְבַּעְתָּ֔ם נָתַ֨ן לָהֶ֧ם הָֽאֱלֹהִ֛ים מַדָּ֥ע וְהַשְׂכֵּ֖ל בְּכׇל־סֵ֣פֶר וְחׇכְמָ֑ה וְדָנִיֵּ֣אל הֵבִ֔ין בְּכׇל־חָז֖וֹן וַחֲלֹמֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to these children God gave knowledge, and understanding in every book, and wisdom: but to Daniel the understanding also of all visions and dreams.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan näille neljälle nuorukaiselle antoi Jumala taidon ja ymmärryksen kaikkinaisissa kirjoituksissa ja viisaudessa; ja Danielille antoi hän ymmärryksen kaikkinaisissa näyissä ja unissa.
verses.king_james: As for these four children, God gave them knowledge and skill in all learning and wisdom: and Daniel had understanding in all visions and dreams.

verses.latin_vulgate: Completis itaque diebus, post quos dixerat rex ut introducerentur, introduxit eos præpositus eunuchorum in conspectu Nabuchodonosor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְמִקְצָת֙ הַיָּמִ֔ים אֲשֶׁר־אָמַ֥ר הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ לַהֲבִיאָ֑ם וַיְבִיאֵם֙ שַׂ֣ר הַסָּרִיסִ֔ים לִפְנֵ֖י נְבֻכַדְנֶצַּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the days were ended, after which the king had ordered they should be brought in: the prince of the eunuchs brought them in before Nabuchodonosor.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin se aika kulunut oli, jonka kuningas määrännyt oli, että he piti tuotaman edes, vei heidät ylimmäinen kamaripalvelia Nebukadnetsarin eteen.
verses.king_james: Now at the end of the days that the king had said he should bring them in, then the prince of the eunuchs brought them in before Nebuchadnezzar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque eis locutus fuisset rex, non sunt inventi tales de universis, ut Daniel, Ananias, Misaël, et Azarias : et steterunt in conspectu regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֣ר אִתָּם֮ הַמֶּ֒לֶךְ֒ וְלֹ֤א נִמְצָא֙ מִכֻּלָּ֔ם כְּדָנִיֵּ֣אל חֲנַנְיָ֔ה מִֽישָׁאֵ֖ל וַעֲזַרְיָ֑ה וַיַּֽעַמְד֖וּ לִפְנֵ֥י הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the king had spoken to them, there were not found among them all such as Daniel, Ananias, Misael, and Azarias: and they stood in the king's presence.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas puhui heidän kanssansa, ja ei kaikkein seassa yhtäkään löydetty, joka Danielin, Hananian, Misaelin ja Asarian kaltainen oli; ja he tulivat kuninkaan palvelioiksi.
verses.king_james: And the king communed with them; and among them all was found none like Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, and Azariah: therefore stood they before the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omne verbum sapientiæ et intellectus, quod sciscitatus est ab eis rex, invenit in eis decuplum super cunctos ariolos et magos qui erant in universo regno ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכֹ֗ל דְּבַר֙ חׇכְמַ֣ת בִּינָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־בִּקֵּ֥שׁ מֵהֶ֖ם הַמֶּ֑לֶךְ וַֽיִּמְצָאֵ֞ם עֶ֣שֶׂר יָד֗וֹת עַ֤ל כׇּל־הַֽחַרְטֻמִּים֙ הָֽאַשָּׁפִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֖ר בְּכׇל־מַלְכוּתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in all matters of wisdom and understanding, that the king enquired of them, he found them ten times better than all the diviners, and wise men, that were in all his kingdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas löysi heidät, kuin hän heitä tutkisteli kaikissa asioissa, kymmenen kertaa toimellisemmiksi ja ymmärtäväisemmiksi kuin kaikki tähtientutkiat ja viisaat koko valtakunnassansa.
verses.king_james: And in all matters of wisdom and understanding, that the king enquired of them, he found them ten times better than all the magicians and astrologers that were in all his realm.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuit autem Daniel usque ad annum primum Cyri regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ דָּֽנִיֵּ֔אל עַד־שְׁנַ֥ת אַחַ֖ת לְכ֥וֹרֶשׁ הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Daniel continued even to the first year of king Cyrus.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Daniel oli siellä hamaan ensimäiseen Koreksen vuoteen asti.
verses.king_james: And Daniel continued even unto the first year of king Cyrus.
